query:
INSERT INTO quiz_questions (lessonId, question, questionType, options, correctAnswer, questionOrder) VALUES
(720005, 'What is the central focus of New Testament theology?', 'multiple_choice', '["Jesus Christ", "The Law of Moses", "The Temple", "The prophets"]', 'Jesus Christ', 1),
(720005, 'According to John 5:39, what do the Scriptures testify about?', 'multiple_choice', '["Christ", "The Law", "The prophets", "Israel"]', 'Christ', 2),
(720005, 'What does 2 Timothy 3:16-17 teach about Scripture?', 'multiple_choice', '["It is God-breathed and useful for teaching", "It is merely human wisdom", "It is optional for believers", "It is outdated"]', 'It is God-breathed and useful for teaching', 3),
(720005, 'According to Hebrews 4:12, what is the Word of God?', 'multiple_choice', '["Living and active", "Dead and passive", "Outdated and irrelevant", "Simple and shallow"]', 'Living and active', 4),
(720005, 'What does James 1:22-25 instruct believers to be?', 'multiple_choice', '["Doers of the Word, not hearers only", "Hearers only", "Teachers only", "Critics of the Word"]', 'Doers of the Word, not hearers only', 5),
(720005, 'What key theme involves God''s reign inaugurated through Christ?', 'multiple_choice', '["The Kingdom of God", "The Roman Empire", "The Jewish nation", "The church hierarchy"]', 'The Kingdom of God', 6),
(720005, 'What does the unity of the New Testament testify to?', 'multiple_choice', '["Divine inspiration", "Human collaboration", "Editorial revision", "Cultural adaptation"]', 'Divine inspiration', 7),
(720005, 'What is required for faithful application of Scripture?', 'multiple_choice', '["Understanding original context and identifying timeless principles", "Ignoring historical context", "Applying everything literally", "Following personal feelings"]', 'Understanding original context and identifying timeless principles', 8),
(720005, 'What shapes believers into Christ''s image according to the lesson?', 'multiple_choice', '["Regular Scripture reading, meditation, and application", "Church attendance alone", "Good works alone", "Religious rituals"]', 'Regular Scripture reading, meditation, and application', 9),
(720005, 'What hope does the New Testament present for the future?', 'multiple_choice', '["Christ''s return", "Political reform", "Economic prosperity", "Human achievement"]', 'Christ''s return', 10),
(720005, 'Summarize the major theological themes of the New Testament and explain how they form a unified message despite diverse authors and genres.', 'short_answer', NULL, 'Key themes include salvation by grace through faith, the Kingdom of God, the Holy Spirit''s work, the church as Christ''s body, and eschatological hope. All writers affirm Christ''s deity, atoning death, resurrection, and return.', 11);
